“So by your Lord (O Muhammad #8), We shall certainly call all of them to account for all that they used to dol

The Nation Of Muhammad 2% Will Bear Witness Upon The Nations On The Day Of Resurrection

Jabalaan ibn Abee Jabalah related the following narration with his chain until the Prophet 2, who 2 said, “When Allah gathers His

Book of The End : Great Trials and Tribulations 361

slaves on the Day of Resurrection, the first to be called is Israafeel. His Lord will say to him, ‘What did you do regarding My Covenant? Did you convey My Covenant?’ He will say, ‘Yes, I have indeed conveyed.’ Then Israafeel will be let go. And it will be said to Jibreel, ‘Did you convey My Covenant?’ He will say, ‘Yes,’ and Jibreel will be released. And it will be said to the Messengers, ‘What did you do with regards to My Covenant?’ They will say, ‘We conveyed to our Nations.’ Then the nations will be called and it will be said to them, ‘Did the Messengers convey to you My Covenant?’ ‘They (the Messengers) will say, ‘We conveyed to them,’ Some from them (ie. from the people of the nations) will reject (what the Messengers said) and some among them will confirm (what the Messengers said).’ The Messengers will say, ‘And indeed we have upon them witnesses who will testify that we conveyed to them, along with Your Witnessing.’ He will say, ‘Who will testify for you?’ They will say, ‘The nation of Muhammad #8. Then the nation of Muhammad will be called, and Allah 8# will say to them, ‘Do you bear witness that these Messengers of Mine have indeed conveyed My Covenant to those they were sent to?’ They will say, “Yes, O our Lord, we bear witness that they have indeed conveyed (it)’ Those Nations will say, ‘How can those testify against us who were not with us? Their Lord #% will say to them (to the nation of Muhammad #4), ‘How do you testify against those who you were not with?’ They will say, ‘Our Lord, You sent to us a Messenger, and You revealed to us Your Covenant and Your Book, and you gave us an account of how they did indeed convey (the Covenant). So we testified based on what You informed us.’ The Lord (Allah) 4% will say, ‘They have spoken the truth.’ And that is the saying of Allah #:

6505 lit oe aa ed uss e3 xsi te as

“Thus We have made you (true Muslims ~ real believers of Islamic Monotheism, true followers of Prophet Muhammad #% and his Sunnah (legal ways), a just (and the best) nation, that you be witnesses over mankind and the Messenger (Muhammad #8) be a witness over you’

362 Book of The End : Great Trials and Tribulations

ibn Abee Ad-Dunyaa related this narration. Ibn Argam said, “It has reached me that the (people of the) Nation of Ahmad (Muhammad #8) will all testify except for he who has rancor in his heart.”

Allah’s Speech With Adam 323 On The Day Of Resurrection

The Nation Of Muhammad #% Among The Nations Is Like A Single White Hair On A Black Ox

Abu Hurairah 4 related that the Messenger of Allah # said, “The first to be called on the Day of Resurrection is Adam As, It will be said, ‘This is your father, Adam.’ He # will say, ‘My Lord, | am here answering Your call, with my attention and intention to You (ie. to obey You).’ Our Lord will say to him, ‘Bring out the share of the Hellfire from your progeny.’ He will say, ‘O my Lord, and how many?’ He will say, ‘From every 100 (people), 99.” Abu Elurairah said, “We said, ‘O Messenger of Allah, if 99 (people) are taken from every 100, then what do you perceive will remain from us?’ He #¢ said, ‘Indeed, my nation among the nations is like a single white hair on a black ox.” (Ahmad)

The First To Be Called On The Day Of Resurrection Is Adam

Abu Hurairah # related that the Messenger of Allah # said, “The first to be called on the Day of Resurrection is Adam 3841, and his progeny will see him, It will be said, ‘This is your father, Adam.’ He will say, ‘My Lord, I am here answering Your call, with my attention and intention to You (ie. to obey You),’ He % will say, ‘Take out the group of the Hellfire from your descendenis...” Then he mentioned the rest of it, in the same manner as in what has preceded. (Bukhaaree)

The Messenger’s Hope That His Followers Constitute Half Of The Inhabitants Of Paradise

Abu Sa’eed 4s related that the Messenger of Allah #8 said, “Aliah will say on the Day of Resurrection, ‘O Adam, stand, and send the B’ath of the Hellfire’ He will say, ‘My Lord, I am here answering Your call, with my attention and intention to You. And all that is

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 363

good is in Your Hands, O my Lord, and what is the B’ath of the Hellfire?’ He ¥¥ will say, ‘From every 1000 (people), 999.’ On that day the newborn will turn gray-headed. And Allah 9 said:

2 ue aie 7 ae oe A kee ~ us wt ot gay GQ jo ols dk aod

They said, “And where is the one?” The Messenger of Allah :8 said, “999 are from Yajooj and Majooj (Gog and Magog) and from you, one.” The people said, “Allahuakbar (Allah is the Greatest).” The Messenger of Allah #% said, “By Allah, 1 do indeed hope that you will be one-quarter of the people of Paradise. By Allah, I do indeed hope that you will be one-third of the people of Paradise. By Allah, I do indeed hope that you will be half of the people of Paradise.” Abu Sa’eed & said, “The people Kabbar (they said, ‘Aliahuakbar, Allah is the Greatest’).” Then the Messenger of Allah #% said, “Among the people, you are nothing except like a single white hair ona black ox, or like a single black hair on a white ox.” (Ahmad) Bukhaaree and Muslim related it as well, but through different chains.

364 Book of The End : Great Trials and Tribulations

Allah’s Speech With Noah #4! And Allah’s Questioning Of Him Regarding Whether He Conveyed (The Message), Just As Allah 3% Said: “Then Surely, We Shall Question Those (People)

To Whom It (The Book) Was Sent And Verily, We Shall Question The Messengers”

Abu Sa’eed # related that the Messenger of Allah ## said, “Noah 321 will be called on the Day of Resurrection, and it will be said to him, ‘Did you convey” Then he will say, ‘Yes.’ His people will be called and it will be said (to them), ‘Did he convey to you?’ They will say, ‘No warner did come to us; no one came to us.’ It will be said to Noah %%, ‘Who will testify for you” He will say, ‘Muhammad and his nation.’ And that is the saying of Allah #

Kool GAGE Boe utes tat te aap

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 365

Muhammad will be called and it will be said to them, “Did this one convey to his nation?’ They will say, ‘Yes.’ It will be said to them, “And who informed you?’ They will say, ‘Muhammad came to us as a Prophet, and he informed us that the Messengers did indeed convey (the message).’” Then he said, “And that is the saying of Allah 3%:

“Thus We have made you (true Muslims - real believers of Islamic Monotheism, true followers of Prophet Muhammad 28 and his Sunnah (legal ways)), a just (and the best) nation’) (Ahmad) Ton Maajah related the same through a different chain of narrators.

That The Nation Of Muhammad 2% Will Bear Witness Upon All Of The Nations On The Day Of Resurrection Proves The Justness And Honor Of This Nation

‘That the nation of Muhammad 2% will bear witness upon all of the nations on the Day of Resurrection proves the justness and honor of this nation. On the Day of Resurrection, the people of this nation will be the just ones among the rest of the nations, and that is why the Prophets want them to bear witness over their nations. Had not the nations acknowledged the honor of this nation, they would not have been forced to accept its testimony. In a hadith of Bahz ibn Hakeem from his father from his grandfather, the Messenger of Allah 3 said, “Indeed you are the completion of 70 nations; you are the best and the most honored of them with Allah #8."
